texto: Want to know the truth about belonging?It takes courage to belong. It takes bravery to show up in your own skin.It’s easy to fit in. It’s easy to blend in and hide your outrageousness.And it’s also the easiest way to lose the precious parts of you.You deserve to be seen. You deserve to be heard. You deserve to be known for the real deal that you are.Stop taking the easy way out. Stop trying to fit in.The best place in life is where you’re already okay.Come home to you. It’s where you belong.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Anne Bechard que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “Want to know the truth about belonging?It takes courage to belong. It takes bravery to show up in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre coragem, fitting-in, individuality, com foco em termino e individuality.
